title: CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g
content_html:
CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g is a non-comedogenic moisturizer designed to support the skin’s overnight recovery process. Formulated with a blend of peptides, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this cream works to replenish moisture, support the skin barrier, and promote a smoother, more even appearance. For those living in Bangladesh, where high humidity, pollution, and fluctuating temperatures can stress the skin, this night cream offers a lightweight yet deeply hydrating solution that mimics the skin’s natural repair cycle while you sleep. It is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, and has been personally verified by the Emart team for authenticity.

Key Benefits

  • Contains peptides (palmitoyl tripeptide-1 and palmitoyl tetrapeptide-7) that signal the skin to support collagen production, contributing to improved firmness and a reduction in the appearance of fine lines.
  • Provides sustained hydration via hyaluronic acid, a humectant that attracts and holds water in the skin, helping to counteract moisture loss caused by air-conditioned indoor spaces and outdoor pollution.
  • Reinforces the skin barrier with three essential ceramides (ceramide NP, ceramide AP, ceramide EOP), which help retain moisture and shield the skin from environmental aggressors common in Dhaka’s urban environment.
  • Uses MVE (Multi-Vesicular Emulsion) technology to deliver ingredients gradually over time, ensuring hydration lasts through the night without feeling heavy or greasy.

Key Ingredients

  • Peptides (Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1 and Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7): Short chains of amino acids that act as signaling molecules. They encourage fibroblasts to produce collagen and elastin, which help maintain skin structure and resilience.
  • Hyaluronic Acid: A naturally occurring polysaccharide that can hold up to 1,000 times its weight in water. It binds moisture to the skin’s surface, providing immediate and lasting hydration without clogging pores.
  • Ceramides (NP, AP, EOP): Lipid molecules that make up about 50% of the skin’s natural barrier. They fill the gaps between skin cells, preventing transepidermal water loss and blocking irritants like fine particulate matter from Dhaka’s air.

Best For

  • Normal to dry skin types that need extra moisture during the night, especially when exposed to humidity, air conditioning, or heavy pollution throughout the day.
  • Those concerned with visible signs of aging such as fine lines, loss of firmness, or uneven texture.
  • Sensitive skin that requires a fragrance-free, non-irritating formula with a minimal ingredient list.
  • Skin that feels dehydrated or tight after cleansing, typical in Bangladesh’s monsoon season when indoor cooling can strip moisture.

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with a known allergy or sensitivity to any of the listed ingredients (e.g., specific peptides or ceramide derivatives). Always check the full ingredient list on the package.
  • Those currently using active exfoliants (e.g., high-concentration AHAs or BHAs) in the same routine without a patch test—this cream can be used after such treatments, but first test a small area to confirm tolerance.
  • Very oily or acne-prone skin may find the rich texture too occlusive if applied in excess. A pea-sized amount is recommended; if any greasiness occurs, reduce the quantity or skip on humid nights.

How to Use

  1. Cleanse your face thoroughly to remove makeup, sunscreen, and daily grime. In Dhaka’s polluted conditions, a double cleanse (oil-based followed by water-based) is recommended.
  2. Apply any treatment serums or targeted products (e.g., a vitamin C serum or retinoid) and allow them to absorb for 1–2 minutes.
  3. Scoop a pea-sized amount (about 0.5 g) of the CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream onto your fingertip. This is sufficient for the entire face and neck.
  4. Dot the cream onto your forehead, cheeks, nose, chin, and neck, then gently spread using upward, outward motions. Avoid rubbing vigorously.
  5. Allow the cream to absorb for 30–60 seconds before getting into bed. It is the final step of your nighttime routine.

Routine Fit

This night cream is designed to be the last step in your PM skincare routine, after cleansing and any water-based serums or treatments. It works well with gentle cleansers and a peptide or hyaluronic acid serum for added hydration. In Bangladesh’s humid evenings, apply a smaller amount if you tend to wake up feeling sticky; the cream is lightweight but may feel richer in high-moisture conditions. For dry, air-conditioned bedrooms or during the cooler winter months, you can use a slightly larger amount or layer it over a hydrating toner. In the morning, follow with a water-based moisturizer or sunscreen—ideally a broad-spectrum SPF compatible with your skin type. Avoid mixing this cream with heavy oils or silicones in the same step, as the MVE technology already ensures controlled release.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.

title: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule 100ml
content_html:
The SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule 100ml is a lightweight, fast-absorbing serum designed to deliver visible brightening and even skin tone. Formulated with encapsulated Madecassoside sourced from Madagascar Centella Asiatica, this ampoule targets dark spots and dullness while strengthening the skin's natural barrier. In Bangladesh's humid climate and high pollution levels, this product offers a non-sticky, breathable solution for those seeking a luminous complexion without heaviness. It is suitable for daily use and has become a trusted choice among local skincare enthusiasts who value gentle yet effective brightening.

Key Benefits

  • Brightens uneven skin tone: Encapsulated Madecassoside from Centella Asiatica helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, promoting a more uniform complexion over consistent use.
  • Lightweight hydration without stickiness: The water-based formula absorbs rapidly into the skin, leaving no greasy residue — ideal for Dhaka's humid weather where heavy serums can feel uncomfortable.
  • Supports skin barrier resilience: Centella Asiatica extract contains compounds that help reinforce the skin's natural defenses against environmental stressors such as pollution and UV exposure, common in urban Bangladesh.
  • Soothes irritation: The anti-inflammatory properties of Centella Asiatica help calm redness and sensitivity caused by heat, dust, and pollution, making it suitable for reactive skin types.

Key Ingredients

  • Madagascar Centella Asiatica Extract: Sourced from pristine regions of Madagascar, this ingredient is rich in amino acids, flavonoids, and triterpenoids. It works by supporting collagen synthesis and reducing oxidative stress, which helps fade pigmentation and soothe inflammation.
  • Madecassoside (Encapsulated): A key active compound from Centella Asiatica, encapsulated in a capsule delivery system to enhance stability and penetration. It inhibits tyrosinase activity, thereby reducing melanin production, and promotes wound healing by stimulating fibroblast activity.
  • Asiaticoside and Asiatic Acid: Additional centelloids that work synergistically to improve microcirculation and strengthen the skin matrix, contributing to a brighter, firmer appearance over time.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): A well-known brightening agent that inhibits melanosome transfer, reduces pore appearance, and supports ceramide production for improved barrier function.

Best For

  • Normal, combination, oily, and acne-prone skin types that need brightening without added oiliness.
  • Individuals with dull, uneven skin tone or post-acne dark spots.
  • Those living in humid climates like Bangladesh who prefer lightweight, non-comedogenic serums.
  • Sensitive or reactive skin that requires soothing ingredients alongside brightening benefits.

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with known allergies to Centella Asiatica or any component of the formula — patch test on the inner arm before first use.
  • Those with severely compromised skin barriers (e.g., active eczema or open wounds) should consult a dermatologist before introducing new active ingredients.
  • If you are using strong exfoliants (AHAs/BHAs) or retinoids in the same routine, introduce this ampoule gradually to avoid over-sensitization.

How to Use

  1. After cleansing and toning, dispense 2–3 drops of the ampoule onto your fingertips or palm.
  2. Gently press the product into your face and neck, avoiding the eye area. Do not rub — patting helps absorption.
  3. Allow 30–60 seconds for the formula to fully absorb before applying moisturizer or sunscreen.
  4. Use twice daily (morning and evening) for consistent brightening results. In the morning, always follow with a broad-spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30+) to protect against UV-induced pigmentation.
  5. If you have very sensitive skin, start with once daily (evening) for the first week, then increase to twice daily as tolerated.

Routine Fit

This ampoule fits into the serum step of your skincare routine, after toner and before moisturizer. In the AM, apply it after a hydrating toner and before a lightweight gel moisturizer and sunscreen. In the PM, use it after cleansing and toning, then follow with a moisturizer suited to your skin type. For Bangladesh's humid climate, pairing it with a water-based moisturizer (e.g., aloe gel or hyaluronic acid cream) prevents excess shine. Avoid layering with other high-concentration brightening agents (like pure vitamin C or arbutin) in the same session unless your skin is well-accustomed — instead, alternate them between AM and PM. This ampoule works well with centella-based toners and calming moisturizers for a soothing, brightening routine tailored to Dhaka's environmental challenges.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.
